title: Java Thread Priority Hierarchy
description: A visual representation of the Java thread priority constants and their numerical values, showing how they relate to each other and the JVM's scheduling behavior.
relationships: The JVM Scheduler uses the priority value as a hint to decide which thread to execute
Higher priority threads (closer to MAX_PRIORITY) are more likely to be scheduled than lower priority threads
NORM_PRIORITY is the default value for a new thread
Priorities are only a suggestion and do not guarantee execution order
